title: Oracle outlines all the ways it could lose the farm it bet on AI
abstract: Oracle provides a comprehensive outline of potential impacts and strategies across its suite of enterprise solutions, enabling businesses to proactively address future challenges.
abstract_zh: 哎呀，这 Oracle 真的是企业解决方案大百科啊！它不仅告诉你可能会遇到的问题是什么，还能给你一些应对策略，让你提前做好准备，妥妥的未来挑战解决方案大师！
